title: GET_HPKE_KEY and GET_KEY_PACKAGE have no rate limit on read path
description: The GET_HPKE_KEY handler (~relay/src/ws.rs:1117) and GET_KEY_PACKAGE handler do not call check_rate_limit before serving responses. Any authenticated client can call them in a tight loop to enumerate all users' keys at full speed. The write paths (PUBLISH_HPKE_KEY, PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE) have rate limits but the read paths do not. Fix: add check_rate_limit at the top of both GET_HPKE_KEY and GET_KEY_PACKAGE handlers, consistent with other handlers.
